name: They have a nightmare || Ananas Dragon Cookie
description:
"My precious island... Anything but my precious island, Longan Dragon Cookie..."

This scene broke my heart :(

●~●~●~●~

Ananas Dragon Cookie awoke with a cry, their scales covered in sweat. Another nightmare. They hadn't had one peaceful night since that horrible incident with Longan Dragon Cookie.

"Just a dream... My precious island is safe..." Ananas Dragon gets up, walking over to their window. Seeing the islands separate again have them momentary peace.

It meant that Longan Dragon Cookie couldn't hurt them anymore. Couldn't hurt their islands. Everyone was safe now, Longan Dragon Cookie was being reformed by the TBD, all was well.

●~●~●~●~

THANK YOU FOR 110 FOLLOWERS!!! 🎉
creator: 1tz_FL1PP3R_FL0PP3RZ_0FF1C14L
